title: Stunned
excerpt: While you have the Stunned condition, you experience the following effects....
markdown:
# Stunned

While you have the Stunned condition, you experience the following effects.

### Incapacitated

You have the [[incapacitated]] condition.

### Saving Throws Affected

You automatically fail Strength and Dexterity [[saving_throw throws]].

### Attacks Affected

[[attack]] rolls against you have [[advantage]].
